description: Trinity harness hooks — runtime dir setup, /trinity:run preflight, subagent log lines.

hooks.command: p=$(jq -r '.prompt // empty' 2>/dev/null); case "$p" in /trinity:run*) if ! git rev-parse --git-dir >/dev/null 2>&1; then echo 'trinity: not inside a git repository.' >&2; exit 2; fi; if [ -n "$(git status --porcelain)" ]; then echo 'trinity: working tree is dirty. Commit or stash before /trinity:run.' >&2; exit 2; fi; _branch=$(git rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD); printf 'trinity: starting on branch %s\n' "$_branch" >&2; _default=$(git symbolic-ref refs/remotes/origin/HEAD 2>/dev/null | sed 's|refs/remotes/origin/||'); [ -z "$_default" ] && _default=main; if [ "$_branch" != "$_default" ]; then printf 'trinity: warning: current branch is not %s. The worktree will still be based on origin/%s regardless of your current branch.\n' "$_default" "$_default" >&2; fi ;; esac
printf '%s generator chunk finished on %s\n' "$(date -u +%FT%TZ)" "$(git rev-parse --short HEAD 2>/dev/null || echo no-git)" >> .trinity/trinity.log
